title: Verify pause trial popup appears and trial pauses correctly
description: Test that clicking Pause Trial button shows popup with 'Remind Later' and 'Pause' options, and trial pauses successfully
preconditions: User is in Trial Corner Manage Trial section

steps.description: 1. Navigate to Trial Corner > Manage Trial
3. Verify popup appears with 'Remind Later' and 'Pause' options

expected_result: Popup appears, clicking Pause pauses the trial, Trial Corner and home widget update to show paused design, all content sections become locked
